summary: Dedupe Pod custom nodes: quarantine volume copies of image-baked packs at boot (VHS/KJNodes/MpiNodes/LTXVideo found doubled live 2026-07-05; volume copies override node_lock-pinned baked versions). Plan.md ready-for-implementation: start.sh canonical-name dedupe + .disabled quarantine + installer guard; ships via publish-runtime.sh, no rebuild. Volume scan itself is load-bearing (per-model packs + GGUF) — kept.

REQUIREMENT ADDED from live evidence: after the MPI-191 test surgery left the volume packs parked in /workspace/_disabled_nodes/, a fresh 5090 pod WEDGED a Wan 5B gen (4min at GENERATING, VRAM 1.9/32 = nothing loaded) — the app/wrapper node-status flow apparently does NOT tolerate baked-only packs (likely mid-boot reinstall race, see project_comfy_node_install_boot_race). MPI-193 MUST make that flow baked-aware BEFORE quarantining, or every deduped volume triggers this. User restore for now: mv /workspace/_disabled_nodes/* back.
